subcodes.first_line: O thou who art drawing nigh unto God! Shouldst thou open a hundred mouths and in each mouth unfurl a hundred tongues in thanksgiving [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مقبل الی الله اگر صد دهان باز نماای و در هر دهان صد زبان بگشاای و بشکرانه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @love of God
